title: Payroll Services

sources.title: 2022 NAICS profile: Payroll Services
sources.what_it_supports: Frozen archetype context only; no target-company economic primitive is inferred from this source.

narrative.executive_view: This packet is restricted to the frozen full-service payroll-provider archetype. Target-company primitives needed for economic scoring are not available and remain explicitly unresolved.
narrative.revenue_and_pass_through: Client payroll, tax deposits, benefits, and similar custodial flows are not a service-revenue substitute. No target accrual revenue or embedded third-party pass-through can be bounded here.
narrative.technical_value: The frozen source-free payroll role taxonomy is retained without substituting the broad 5412 occupation mix. No target cash-cost pool or cash removability evidence is available.
narrative.implementation: Payroll calculation, payment, tax filing, and exception workflows have accountable control requirements, but no target-specific realization path or implementation-investment schedule is evidenced.
narrative.commercial_capture: No target-band contracts, cohort retention, repricing, or renewal evidence supports a commercial-retention schedule. It is deliberately distinct from implementation and survival.
narrative.buyability: The frozen band estimate is not evidence of sale availability, access, win rate, deal execution capacity, or integration capacity for the reference buyer.
narrative.entry_and_exit: No comparable, consistently normalized entry multiple or state-consistent downside exit construct is available. Price, buyer access, and operating transformation are not conflated.
narrative.operator_survival: No exhaustive target service basket reconciled to recognized controllable value-added revenue is available, so constant-price operator-controlled demand survival remains missing.
narrative.risks_and_uncertainty: The missing denominator, operating evidence, market evidence, and fixed-base service data prevent an economic conclusion. Assumption-mode cash inputs also necessarily retain unproven readiness.

scenario_narratives.low: Downside primitives are unresolved rather than replaced with a synthetic operating, commercial, or valuation scenario.
scenario_narratives.base: The base case preserves the frozen archetype and role taxonomy while leaving unsupported target-company primitives missing.
scenario_narratives.high: Upside is not inferred from industry size, client funds, generic software claims, or multiple expansion; evidence must establish it.

recognized_revenue.rationale: No target-company trailing-twelve-month accrual recognized-service-revenue evidence was supplied.
caveats: Custodial client funds cannot replace recognized revenue.

evidence.rationale: No target accounting-policy and reconciliation evidence was supplied.

employee_cash_cost.accounting_basis: Target-company controllable employee cash compensation and cash burden; no denominator pass-through included.

amount.rationale: Bounded source-free planning placeholder required by the frozen assumption-mode cost basis; it is not a measured payroll-provider amount.
caveats: Replace only with target-specific payroll and burden evidence.

controllable_contractor_cash_cost.accounting_basis: Operator-controlled contractor cash cost only; excludes any amount classified as denominator pass-through.

amount.rationale: Bounded source-free planning placeholder required by the frozen assumption-mode cost basis; it is not a measured contractor amount.
caveats: Replace only with target-specific contractor ledgers and statements of work.

removable_fraction.rationale: Source-free bounded removability judgment for the frozen role only.
caveats: Not task-time or measured savings evidence.

target_archetype_coverage.rationale: Frozen count bridge does not establish a target-company coverage primitive for this packet.

five_year_sale_availability.rationale: No verified owner-transition or sale-availability evidence.

buyer_access_win_share.rationale: No evidence of conditional access and win share at market-clearing price.

buy_multiple.rationale: No consistently normalized comparable entry multiple is available.

normalized_y5_operating_state.rationale: No evidence supports the closed entry-equivalent year-five operating state.

anchor.rationale: No entry-equivalent comparable-multiple anchor is evidenced.

operator_controlled_value_added_demand_s.rationale: No exhaustive fixed-base target service basket reconciled to recognized controllable value-added revenue is available.

cross_checks.target_identity_preserved: Uses only the frozen full-service-offering payroll archetype.
cross_checks.pass_through_removed_once: No pass-through items are asserted; reconciliation partitions are canonically empty.
cross_checks.removability_only_in_v: Role removability judgments are not reused as realization, retention, or survival inputs.
cross_checks.investment_only_in_i: Implementation investment remains separate from cash removability and commercial retention.
cross_checks.commercial_only_in_c: Commercial retention is not substituted with implementation or fixed-base survival.
cross_checks.buyer_access_separate_from_price: Access and win remain distinct from entry valuation and are unresolved separately.
cross_checks.p_uses_frozen_y5_state: The missing downside construct still binds the required null state digest consistently.
cross_checks.p_excludes_c_and_survival: The closed downside exclusion map excludes commercial retention and survival.
cross_checks.survival_is_constant_price_value_added: The missing basket is not substituted with pricing, revenue, or generic demand assertions.

top_uncertain_inputs.score_impact: Without target accrual revenue and reconciliation, V and fixed-base survival cannot be identified.
I and the h cross-check require target workflow and investment schedules.
C, B, and P require distinct retention, access, capacity, and valuation evidence.

reviewer_note: Primitive-only packet. It preserves frozen assumption-mode cost identifiers and role weights; unsupported target-company and market primitives remain MISSING for deterministic finalization.
